title: Molecular identification and characterization of partial COX1 gene from caecal worm (Aulonocephalus pennula) in Northern bobwhite (Colinus virginianus) from the Rolling Plains Ecoregion of Texas
author: Kalyanasundaram, Aravindan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.title: Fig
steps.instruction: Fig. 2. A. PCR amplification of COX1 gene using nematode primers. Lane M: 100 bp DNA ladder (Fermentas); lane 1‾4 COX1 gene amplicon (750 bp). B. PCR amplification of partial COX1 gene using gene specific primers. Lane M: 100 bp DNA Marker (Fermentas); lane 1‾4 partial COX1 amplified products (405bp).
